calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-29-2013 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Hearing For Default Prove Up
Off Calendar Jan-17-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Capital One Bank (USA), N.A.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Brian Stableford.
Defult of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $26,340.80
Pre-Judgment Interest: Waived.
Costs: $559.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $26,899.80
Judgment signed in open court.

Ntc Of Hearing For Default Prove Up
Off Calendar Jan-03-2013 Continued To Jan-17-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
